abilities.description: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to any target. If you lose the flip, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to itself.

effect.description: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to any target. If you lose the flip, CARDNAME deals 2 damage to itself.
effect.name: FlipACoin
